ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( OR( $Profile.Name = "Sales Admin Process Manager", $Profile.Name = "CBDO" ),
NOT( OR( ISPICKVAL(StageName,"Sales Accepted Lead"), ISPICKVAL(StageName,"Sales Qualified Opportunity"), ISPICKVAL(StageName,"Proposal Request"), ISPICKVAL(StageName,"Proposal Development"), ISPICKVAL(StageName,"Proposal Presented"), ISPICKVAL(StageName,"Down Select"), ISPICKVAL(StageName,"Contract Request"), ISPICKVAL(StageName,"Marketing Qualified Lead"), ISPICKVAL(StageName,"Closed-No Bid"), ISPICKVAL(StageName,"Closed-Lost") ) ), ISCHANGED(StageName) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Progression not allowed, progression to this stage is managed by the Contracting Process.
